findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Header official names and titles are duplicated in the HTML rendering, appearing once in the letterhead header area at the top and again as plain body text below the footer/divider bar, before the MEMORANDUM heading.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows 'PAT McCRORY Governor / DONALD R. VAN DER VAART Secretary / TRACY DAVIS Director' once in the upper-right letterhead area. HTML chunk 1 shows these same names/titles in the upper-right header AND again as left-aligned body text ('PAT McCRORY / Governor / DONALD R. VAN DER VAART / Secretary / TRACY DAVIS / Director') below the footer and colored divider bar, before the MEMORANDUM heading. A reader encounters this information twice.
